profile_summary: Couple traveler (high budget) prioritizing quietness, spa & wellness, service.

recommendations.justification: The Grand Harbour, Barcelona ranks #1 for this traveler on quietness (+0.86), spa & wellness (+0.86), service (+0.85), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "The spa was a highlight — incredible massages and a serene relaxation pool."

supporting_evidence.quote: The spa was a highlight — incredible massages and a serene relaxation pool.
Wonderful wellness facilities; the sauna and treatments left us completely refreshed.
Front desk was friendly and incredibly helpful with every request.

recommendations.justification: The Royal Sands, Rome ranks #2 for this traveler on quietness (+0.60), spa & wellness (+0.88), service (+0.75), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "The spa was a highlight — incredible massages and a serene relaxation pool."

supporting_evidence.quote: The spa was a highlight — incredible massages and a serene relaxation pool.
The level of refinement and personal service was world-class.
Wonderful wellness facilities; the sauna and treatments left us completely refreshed.

recommendations.justification: Hotel Riverside, Mexico City ranks #3 for this traveler on quietness (+0.69), spa & wellness (+0.82), service (+0.72), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Staff went above and beyond — genuinely warm, attentive service throughout."

supporting_evidence.quote: Staff went above and beyond — genuinely warm, attentive service throughout.
A proper retreat: yoga in the morning and an excellent spa in the afternoon.
The spa was a highlight — incredible massages and a serene relaxation pool.

recommendations.justification: Hotel Vista, Mumbai ranks #4 for this traveler on quietness (+0.79), spa & wellness (+0.78), service (+0.68), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Room was wonderfully peaceful and the blackout curtains were perfect."

supporting_evidence.quote: Room was wonderfully peaceful and the blackout curtains were perfect.
Fantastic for families — connecting rooms, a kids' club, and high chairs at breakfast.
The spa was a highlight — incredible massages and a serene relaxation pool.
